phrases.intent_en: Ask which local wines they serve
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿qué vinos locales sirven aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿keh VEE-nohs loh-KAH-les SEER-ven ah-KEE?

likely_response.local: Tenemos vino de Málaga y dulce.
likely_response.pronunciation: teh-NEH-mohs BEE-noh DEH MÁLAH-gah Y DOOL-theh
likely_response.translation_en: We serve Málaga and sweet wine.

responses.english: We serve Málaga and sweet wine.
responses.phonetic: teh-NEH-mohs BEE-noh DEH MÁLAH-gah Y DOOL-theh
responses.french: Tenemos vino de Málaga y dulce.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the wine barrels are stored
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde guardan las barricas de vino?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh GWAR-dahn lahs bah-RREE-kahs deh VEE-noh?

likely_response.local: Al fondo, detrás de la barra derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHTRÁS DEH LAH BAHR-rah deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, behind the right bar.

responses.english: At the back, behind the right bar.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHTRÁS DEH LAH BAHR-rah deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Al fondo, detrás de la barra derecha.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo se piden las tapas aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KO-mo se PEE-den las TA-pas a-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pida en la barra o espere al camarero.
likely_response.pronunciation: PEE-dah EHN LAH BAHR-rah OH eh-SPEH-reh AHL kah-mah-REH-roh
likely_response.translation_en: Order at the bar or wait for the waiter.

responses.english: Order at the bar or wait for the waiter.
responses.phonetic: PEE-dah EHN LAH BAHR-rah OH eh-SPEH-reh AHL kah-mah-REH-roh
responses.french: Pida en la barra o espere al camarero.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde están los servicios por favor?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAHN lohs sehr-VEE-see-ohs por fah-BOR?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del pasillo, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the hall, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the hall, on the left.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Al fondo del pasillo, a la izquierda.
